example: The capture ghost hovers a valid target; its aura is alive instead of a static glow

variants.focus: Breathing pulse: the halo swells and fades in a slow rhythm — the same breath the orb uses on the way in.
Radar ping: rings expand outward from the ghost in a steady beat, like a sensor locking on.
Orbiting sparks: small accent dots circle the ghost, speeding up as it arms over the target.
Sweeping arc: a bright highlight sweeps around the rim of the aura, a rotating scan.
